name: Salih-Can Özdemir
title: Senior Software Engineer · Angular & .NET
introduction: Hi! I'm Salih-Can Özdemir, a passionate Senior Software Engineer based in Düsseldorf, Germany. Combining a formal degree in Business Informatics with deep-dive technical software development expertise, I specialize in architecting robust systems and designing delightful digital experiences. My core expertise lies at the intersection of powerful backend architectures using .NET (C#) and rich, responsive user interfaces built with Angular. I believe that engineering efficiency and exceptional UI/UX design go hand in hand. Whether I am optimizing data pipelines, setting up scalable microservices, or bridging the gap between high-fidelity Figma blueprints and clean code, I strive to build software that is modular, performant, and intuitive.
certifications: MS-012 · Microsoft AI & Copilot for Microsoft 365
IREB CPRE-FL · Certified Professional for Requirements Engineering
